overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character walks under elevated highways, past holographic billboards and palm trees, turns at an intersection, and approaches a colorful pedestrian bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure overhead casting shadows on the street
large purple holographic billboard displaying a woman's face with pink hair
cluster of neon signs and advertisements on the facades of left-side buildings
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb of the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing parked cars and neon-lit buildings on the left. A prominent purple holographic billboard hangs overhead, and the area is sheltered from the sky by the concrete structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban boulevard with palm trees and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the covered area under the overpass into open sky with dusk lighting
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk passing palm trees and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person wearing a yellow jacket and white hat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the sidewalk against the dusk sky
pair of tall cylindrical industrial towers with illuminated rings near the top
tall yellow pole with traffic signals and attached billboards

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass area, the scene opens to a dusk sky with warm orange hues. The camera walks past palm trees on the right and approaches an intersection. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead, and the purple holographic billboard remains visible but closer. Tall cylindrical towers rise in the distance against the evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and mixed architecture

events.description: turns left at the intersection to cross the multi-lane street
crossing the street while futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the street at the intersection, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story red brick building with balconies and hanging laundry
elevated pedestrian walkway with rainbow-colored illuminated panels
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the intersection and crosses the multi-lane street, navigating between passing vehicles. A red brick apartment building with hanging laundry becomes prominent on the left, while a colorful illuminated pedestrian bridge becomes visible ahead in the distance. The crosswalk stripes mark the path across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with directional signage

events.description: enters covered area under elevated highway structure with directional signs

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated structure toward the colorful pedestrian bridge

entered.detail: concrete elevated highway support structure with attached directional signage
multiple black signs with white text pointing to Santo Domingo, Westbrook, and other districts
large industrial buildings labeled 06 and 07 with illuminated numbers

segments.scene_description: Walking under another elevated highway structure, the camera passes directional signs pointing to various city districts including Santo Domingo. The colorful pedestrian bridge is now visible to the left, and industrial storage tanks labeled 06 and 07 stand in the distance on the right. The area is sheltered and illuminated by artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of a massive highway overpass into the vibrant, open atmosphere of a neon-lit city at dusk. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk beneath a heavy overpass, passing parked cars and a glowing purple holographic billboard. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene opens to a warm orange evening sky featuring distant cylindrical towers and palm trees lining the path toward an intersection. The camera then turns left to cross a multi-lane street past a red brick apartment building with hanging laundry, navigating through traffic toward a colorful illuminated pedestrian bridge. Finally, the movement leads back under another elevated structure past directional signs for Santo Domingo, shifting the view toward industrial storage tanks and the glowing bridge to the left.
